run_metadata.coverage_summary: Tier 1 government portals swept via web search (AusTender, buy.nsw/NSW eTendering, Buying for Victoria, QTenders, Tenders WA/SA/Tas/NT, Tenders ACT). Tier 2 sampled (water corporations, universities, Homes Tasmania, local councils via VendorPanel). Tier 3 attempted (SAP Ariba Discovery, Sydney Water/Ariba, Melbourne Water/Zycus). Detail-page extraction was NOT possible this run: WebFetch returned HTTP 403 for every host attempted (including AusTender, buy.nsw, VendorPanel, council sites, and even non-AU control sites), so no tender detail pages or documents could be opened. All captured opportunities are therefore headline-level, drawn from official-portal search-result snippets, and are flagged as pending a detailed deliverables pass. No deliverables, contacts, values or dates were inferred where not explicitly seen.
gaps: WebFetch tool returned HTTP 403 Forbidden for ALL URLs attempted this run — including AusTender ATM detail pages, tenders.nsw.gov.au RFT detail pages, tenders.vic.gov.au/tenders/open, tenders.wa.gov.au, qtenders.hpw.qld.gov.au, vendorpanel.com.au, council sites, and a non-AU control (en.wikipedia.org). This is an environment-level fetch outage, not a per-site login wall. Consequently no tender detail pages or specification documents could be read; deliverables_summary, key_deliverables, requirements, evaluation_criteria, contacts and exact publish dates could not be captured.
curl via the egress proxy returned HTTP 000 for tenders.nsw.gov.au and tenders.gov.au, so direct HTML fallback was also unavailable.
All four captured tenders remain at headline level (title, buyer, tender id, close date from portal search snippets) and need a detailed pass once fetch access is restored.
AusTender: AIMS NT Small Research Vessel Replacement (AIMSRFT785) seen but closed 10-Jul-2026 (before run date) — excluded as not open.

Tier 3 corporate: SAP Ariba Discovery, Sydney Water (SAP Ariba), and Melbourne Water (Zycus) checked but individual live AU RFx are login-gated; with WebFetch down no publicly-visible corporate RFx could be confirmed. No corporate opportunity fabricated. Portals recorded in discovered_sources / already known.

University opportunities surfaced only via aggregator (australiantenders.com.au) — e.g. RMIT architects panel EOI, La Trobe Bundoora HV Infrastructure Renewal EOI — could not be confirmed on the buyer's own source with WebFetch down, so they were NOT recorded as tenders (aggregator = discovery signal only). Buyer portals noted in discovered_sources for a future authenticated/fetch-enabled pass.

Tenders SA, Tenders ACT and NT QTOL: only portal landing pages and a small number of AusTender-cross-listed refs surfaced via search; no state-specific open opportunity could be verified to headline level this run — deferred.
recommended_seed_additions: Homes Tasmania — Tenders, EOI and grants (https://www.homestasmania.com.au/engage/Tenders,-EOI-and-Grants) — GBE-style housing buyer with its own EOI/RFGP page; not in current known list.
RMIT University — Procurement / Tenders (Victorian university buyer, runs EOI/RFP panels; not previously tracked).
La Trobe University — Procurement / Tenders (Victorian university buyer; Bundoora campus capital works EOIs).

tenders.title: Trades Recognition Australia Assessment Services Panel
tenders.buyer: Department of Employment and Workplace Relations
tenders.category: Education and Training Services / Skills assessment
tenders.description: Approach to market to establish a panel of providers of assessment services for Trades Recognition Australia (TRA), the Australian Government's trade skills assessment authority.
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via web search of the AusTender Current ATM list (buyer-originated Commonwealth procurement portal). Headline fields (ATM ID, buyer, close date/time) taken from the AusTender search snippet.
tenders.notes: Headline-level only — AusTender ATM detail page (tenders.gov.au/Atm/Show/...) returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch this run, so scope, deliverables, evaluation criteria and contact could not be captured. Needs a detail pass when fetch access is restored.

tenders.title: RAAF Base Wagga Lead Removal Works, NSW
tenders.description: Request for tender for lead removal (hazardous material remediation) works at RAAF Base Wagga in New South Wales.
tenders.delivery_location: RAAF Base Wagga, Wagga Wagga, NSW
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via web search of the AusTender Current ATM list (buyer-originated Commonwealth portal). Headline fields (ATM ID, buyer, location, close date/time) taken from the AusTender search snippet.
tenders.notes: Headline-level only — AusTender ATM detail page returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch this run; scope of works, licensing/insurance requirements, briefing and contact could not be captured. Needs a detail pass.

tenders.title: Supply and Delivery of Home Parenteral Nutrition, Intravenous Fluids and Associated Items (Standing Offer Arrangement)
tenders.buyer: Metro North Hospital and Health Service (Queensland Health)
tenders.category: Medical and health supplies / Clinical nutrition
tenders.description: Invitation to offer to establish a Standing Offer Arrangement for the supply and delivery of home parenteral nutrition, intravenous fluids and associated items for Metro North Hospital and Health Service.
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via web search of the QTenders directory (buyer-originated Queensland Government portal) and corroborated as a Metro North HHS standing-offer sourcing event. Headline fields (buyer, scope title, close date) from QTenders search snippets.
tenders.notes: Headline-level only — QTenders detail page (qtenders.hpw.qld.gov.au) returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch this run, so the tender reference number, exact closing time, item schedules, eligibility and contact could not be captured. Tender_id left blank as it was not visible in the snippet. Needs a detail pass.

tenders.title: Freer Farm ATCoE - Building Extension
tenders.description: Request for tender for a building extension at the TasTAFE Freer Farm Agricultural Training Centre of Excellence (ATCoE), Burnie, Tasmania.
tenders.delivery_location: Freer Farm Training Facility, Burnie, TAS
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via web search of the Tasmanian Government eTendering site (tenders.tas.gov.au, buyer-originated portal) with the TasTAFE RFT reference. Headline fields (buyer, tender reference, project) from the Tenders Tasmania search snippet.
tenders.notes: Headline-level only — Tenders Tasmania detail page returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch this run, so the closing date/time, scope, prequalification/licensing requirements and contact could not be captured. Closing date not visible in snippet and left null (not inferred). Needs a detail pass.

discovered_sources.source_name: Homes Tasmania — Tenders, EOI and grants
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Web search for Tasmanian housing procurement; Homes Tasmania (statutory housing authority) publishes its own Tenders/EOI/RFGP page and also advertises on tenders.tas.gov.au. Recent items include SDA management services procurement, general maintenance services (Southern TAS), off-the-plan apartment supply, and insurance coverage.
discovered_sources.notes: Buyer-originated authority page, not previously tracked. Full opportunity detail is cross-listed on Tenders Tasmania. Could not open the page this run (WebFetch 403); captured from search snippet.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Surfaced via a tender aggregator as an RMIT EOI to appoint a panel of prequalified architects for RMIT capital projects (two-stage EOI then RFP). Aggregator used only as a discovery signal; RMIT is a Victorian university buyer running its own panel procurements. Buyer portal recorded for a future verified pass.
discovered_sources.notes: Not previously tracked. The specific architects-panel EOI was NOT recorded as a tender because it could not be confirmed on RMIT's own source (WebFetch 403). Source_url is the likely procurement landing page and should be verified.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Surfaced via aggregator as a La Trobe EOI for the Bundoora Campus High Voltage Infrastructure Renewal project (building/construction contractors). Aggregator used only as a discovery signal; La Trobe is a Victorian university buyer. Buyer portal recorded for a future verified pass.
discovered_sources.notes: Not previously tracked. The Bundoora HV EOI was NOT recorded as a tender (unconfirmed on buyer source; WebFetch 403). Source_url should be verified.

discovered_sources.source_name: SAP Business Network Discovery (SAP Ariba Discovery)
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Mandatory Tier 3 check. Public posting board where buyers post open RFx; full detail requires a free supplier account. Checked this run for AU postings but no publicly-visible AU corporate RFx could be confirmed with WebFetch unavailable.
discovered_sources.notes: Already known. Access is free-registration for full opportunity detail. No corporate opportunity fabricated. Recorded to keep the Tier 3 source set complete.
